DECLARATION OF IN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INSPECTION DEMAND AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO INSPECTION DEMAND AND OPPOSITION TO IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT VILMA OLAES (TRANSACTION ID # 100008721) FILED BY DEFENDANT OLAES, VILMA

DISCOVERY, 302, THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S (THE "CITY'S") MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INSPECTION DEMAND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT OLAES SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSES AND ALL DOCUMENTS BY 5:00 P.M. ON NOVEMBER 30, 2015. RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION MAY BE MADE VIA E-MAIL. VERIFICATION MUST FOLLOW IN ORIGINAL ON "WET" COPY BY DECEMBER 3, 2015. THE CITY'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,920.00 TO BE PAID BY DECEMBER 14, 2015 AT 10:00 A.M. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE WORD MINUTES AND FORMAL ORDER FOR COURT'S COMPLETE RULING). JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Discovery Motion Plaintiff City And County Of San Francisco Notice Of Motion And Motion To 1. Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand And Production Of Documents Responsive To Inspection Demand, Set One, And 2. Impose Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Vilma Olaes
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Deputy City Attorneys MICHAEL S. WEISS and VICTORIA L. WEATHERFORD of the Office of the City Attorney, Tel No. 415-554-3800 appearing for Plaintiffs the City and County of San Francisco and the People of the State of California;
Atty. RODEL E. RODIS, ESQ. of Law Offices of Rodel E. Rodis, Tel No. 415-334-7800 appearing for Defendant Vilma Olaes.

RULING - Defense counsel indicates that he does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. However, the Court determines that defense counsel did not timely contest the Court's tentative ruling, and, therefore, is deemed to have stipulated to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling to specify the amount of sanctions awarded, and the deadlines for compliance, and orders as follows: The City and County of San Francisco's (the "City's") Motion to Compel Further Responses to Inspection Demand is GRANTED. Defendant OLAES shall provide responses and all documents by 5:00 p.m. on November 30, 2015. Responses and production may be made via e-mail. Verification must follow in original on "wet" copy by December 3, 2015. The City's request for monetary sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $4,920.00 to be paid by December 14, 2015 at 10:00 a.m. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (See Word minutes and formal order for Court's complete ruling). Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
